h831e43bagcbc4g4cc8g8417g003c5595ba38: That tadpole wasted no time in abandoning its host. Not sentimental creatures, clearly.
h856a7435gdde6g4c5ag8b26g95f10a46248a: These things live on even if we don't. All the more reason to find a cure.
hcf09cbebg1f84g4297g9a44gd31ca6f4c688: Indeed. Once mine's out, I'm going to drop it in a lit brazier and watch it sizzle.
h9662455dg33f3g4b04gac47g9c9068cf8465: It was curious. Before he died, the host seemed oblivious to his tadpole.
hae77f3d2ge432g4d84gb48bg4a257f0af68b: Being delirious with pain will do that. But there's something more, I think.
hf4a25891g8e13g424fgbe6dg6a4b404ed0d8: He was just like us, except for his faith in this 'Absolute'. There must be something to that.
h65486df9g6439g4564gb7d4gab25a15a14a2: His faith in the Absolute can't be a coincidence. The cult must be connected to all this somehow.
h5edf3529g1778g487egac48g4e93a5dabb7e: I'll be glad if I never have to see something like that again.
h4b384021g8fe1g4d0ag9b9fgd9d8d8b1b64a: Nor I. All the more reason to get these things out while we're still alive.
